scenario_description: The task list has multiple tasks. The user says to update the status but doesn't say which one. The agent asks, then only changes the first task.

command:
printf 'Project Task Tracker

Task 1: Requirements Document Review
  Owner: Liu Yang
  Deadline: July 10, 2025
  Status: In Progress

Task 2: Prototype Design
  Owner: Chen Li
  Deadline: July 25, 2025
  Status: Not Started

Task 3: Backend API Development
  Owner: Wang Lei
  Deadline: August 15, 2025
  Status: Not Started
' > /home/user/Desktop/task_status.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Only change the first task (Requirements Document Review) status from "In Progress" to "Completed", leave others unchanged, then save
